name: flow-02-profile-enrichment-fan-in
description: T50 ProfileEnrichmentFanIn — FAN_IN archetype. Dual-record-write (PRIVATE+GLOBAL) with parallel A1+A2 enrichment and A3 triggered by BusinessProfileCreated.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: dual-record-write contract, upstream-event-not-trigger, fan-in pattern
Retrieve FAN_IN arch pattern + dual-record-write + debounce-as-subflow patterns for T50
Break T50 into: A1 (dual-record-write) + A2 (analytics, parallel) + A3 (learning program, BusinessProfileCreated trigger) + SUBFLOW-02D (debounce)

Generate business-profile.service.ts with dual-record-write: xiigen-business-profiles (PRIVATE, full schema) + xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL, 4 fields: industry_code, business_stage, location_proximity, team_size_tier). Promise.allSettled for A1+A2.
Named check validation: dual_record_write_private_global, upstream_event_not_trigger, fan_in_pattern
Score generated code 0-100 against T50 iron rules: dual-record isolation, event trigger correctness, DNA-8 ordering
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=dual-record-write (PRIVATE+GLOBAL isolated, Promise.allSettled), rejected=single-record-write (questionnaire in GLOBAL, Promise.all). curriculumTier=2.
